steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery

steps.expression: window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__ && typeof window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__.patchBuilderState === 'function' && window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__.patchBuilderState({ selectedMeasures: ['avails'], primaryMeasure: 'avails', selectedDimensions: ['eventDate', 'channelV2'], chartSpec: { title: 'Avails by Date and Channel', type: 'area', xField: 'eventDate', yFields: ['avails'], seriesField: 'channelV2', eyebrow: 'Visual Story', accentTone: 'delivery', highlights: ['Split by Channel', 'Trend View', 'Full Query'] }, viewMode: 'chart', staticFilters: { dateRange: { start: '2026-05-01', end: '2026-05-04' } } })

steps.text: Chart-first view for the active scope using the full query result set.

steps.expression: (() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; if (!preview || !preview.replaceFetchBehaviors) { return false; } preview.__chartRetryBaseline = { errorCount: (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'chartQuery' && entry.phase === 'error').length, successCount: (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'chartQuery' && entry.phase === 'success').length }; return preview.replaceFetchBehaviors([{ match: { type: 'chartQuery' }, error: 'Chart query failed.' }]); })()

(() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; const baseline = preview?.__chartRetryBaseline; if (!preview || !baseline) { return false; } const errorCount = (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'chartQuery' && entry.phase === 'error').length; return errorCount > baseline.errorCount; })()

(() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; const baseline = preview?.__chartRetryBaseline; if (!preview || !baseline) { return false; } const successCount = (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'chartQuery' && entry.phase === 'success').length; return successCount > baseline.successCount; })()
